product.name: Daily Essentials Shake

packaging.type: Stand-up flexible pouch with resealable zip top
packaging.material: Matte flexible plastic, slightly crinkly when handled
packaging.weight_when_full: ~500g, sags slightly in hand, not rigid
label_elements: LYFEfuel logo (white, top-left of turquoise section)
Brown tree/plant icon (center of turquoise section)
DAILY ESSENTIALS SHAKE (large, cream on brown)
3 stat boxes: 25 Whole Food Ingredients | 18g Plant-Based Protein | 2g All-Natural Sugar
6 benefit boxes: Probiotics, Antioxidants, Super Greens, Digestive Enzymes, Vitamins & Minerals, D3/B12/K2/Mg/Co-Q10
Bottom badges: NON-GMO, NO SOY, NOTHING ARTIFICIAL, NO DAIRY, VEGAN
packaging.scale_in_hand: Pouch height is roughly 1.5x a woman's hand-span. When held at chest level, top of pouch reaches chin area, bottom at mid-chest. Wider than a hand grip so fingers wrap around the middle, slightly crumpling the sides

reference_images.notes: Additional angles (back, side, lifestyle) should be added as available

key_claims: D3, B12, K2, Mg, Co-Q10 for nutritional gaps

usage_context.when: Morning routine, breakfast replacement or addition
usage_context.how: Mix with water, milk, or blend into smoothie
usage_context.daily_habit_signal: Pouch sitting on counter near coffee maker, partially used (not brand new)

strongest_hooks: Taste surprise (chocolate flavor that's actually good)
Skeptic conversion (tried everything, this actually works)
proof_points: How you feel after 2 weeks (energy, digestion, skin)
Price per serving vs buying each supplement separately
